task_completion.description: OpenBCI GUI is running a Synthetic session
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenBCI GUI window. It should indicate it is running a 'Synthetic' session, typically visible in the top control bar or system status area.

task_completion.description: The Networking widget is open in the GUI
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Networking' widget (sometimes called Networking or Streaming) actively displayed within the OpenBCI GUI interface.

task_completion.description: LSL protocol is selected for streaming
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Networking widget, look for the protocol dropdown or selection area. It must be explicitly set to 'LSL' (Lab Streaming Layer).

task_completion.description: Accelerometer data type is selected for the LSL stream
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Networking widget's LSL configuration section, look for the data type selection. The option for 'Accel/Aux' (or 'Accel' / 'Accelerometer') must be selected, checked, or toggled on.

task_completion.description: ONLY Accelerometer data is selected (no other data types)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the other data type options in the LSL configuration (e.g., TimeSeries, EEG, FFT, BandPower). They must all be unselected, unchecked, or toggled off so that ONLY Accel/Aux is configured to stream.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the configured widget is saved to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the screenshot was saved to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/lsl_accel_config.png'. This can be a terminal window showing a screenshot command (like scrot, import, or mv/cp) targeting this exact path, a file manager displaying the file in the correct directory, or an in-app GUI notification.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenBCI GUI application
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the OpenBCI GUI application is actually open and its UI elements were manipulated. The agent should not just be editing a text configuration file or mocking the UI.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine image file
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the final output appears to be a real screenshot of the GUI (e.g., viewed in an image viewer or captured via a valid screenshot tool), not a text file or script maliciously renamed with a .png extension.

integrity.description: Agent did not fake completion by echoing paths
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent didn't just 'echo' the task description or the expected file path into a terminal to trick the verifier without actually performing the GUI configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/lsl_accel_config.png'. The target protocol is 'LSL' (Lab Streaming Layer). In the OpenBCI GUI, the accelerometer data type is officially labeled 'Accel/Aux' (or 'Accel'). Ensure that ONLY this data type is selected for the LSL stream, and all other types (like TimeSeries/EEG) are disabled to save bandwidth.
